## FakeETagActor Class

Test double for [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.IETagActor](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/hexalith.eventstore.server.actors.ietagactor 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.IETagActor')\.
Records invocations and returns configurable results\.
Produces self\-routing ETags using the configured projection type\.
